records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when an official date-addressable Conghua meeting calendar is published.
records.blocked_reason: The official source confirms an October 2026 launch but does not yet provide a stable upcoming meeting-date calendar.
limitations: The reviewed scope covers Conghua Racecourse only.
Launch timing must not be converted into a meeting date.
No current calendar fields are approved.
records.notes: Keep Mainland China out of current-calendar rows until an official meeting calendar is available.
